settings.heading: A central gateway for practical business operations support
settings.text: Find the right route for running the business, improving recurring work, accessing practical tools, and getting support when the next step is unclear.

settings.heading: Choose the operations pathway
settings.text: Start with the operational outcome you need, then move into operations services, Business NBN support or contact support.

settings.title: Run the business
settings.text: Browse services for recurring work, controls, admin systems and operating support.

settings.title: Improve recurring work
settings.text: Use practical services and support pathways to clean up recurring operational work.

settings.title: Get operations support
settings.text: Contact support when the right next step, owner or pathway needs context.

settings.heading: Run, improve and support business operations
settings.text: Use the hub to move into a practical service, resource or support route without guessing where to start.

settings.title: Run the business
settings.text: Support for recurring work, accountability, controls and operating rhythm.

settings.title: Improve the business
settings.text: Support for registers, calendars, documentation, workflows and knowledge bases.

settings.title: Access support
settings.text: Use support when the next operational step needs routing, context or follow-through.

settings.heading: Useful starting points for business operators
settings.text: Use these confirmed destinations to move from an operational issue into a service, product or support pathway.

settings.title: Operations Services
settings.text: Operational services and support products for recurring business work.

settings.title: Compliance Calendar and Obligations Register
settings.text: Implementation support for recurring obligations, calendars and registers.

settings.title: Business NBN Support
settings.text: Business connectivity support, availability boundaries and next steps.

settings.heading: Use support when the right operational path is unclear
settings.text: Send the context and the outcome you need so RBP can route you to the right service, resource or next step.
settings.aside_text: Tell us what is stuck, what has already been tried, who owns the work and whether you need advice, delivery or a self-serve resource.

settings.heading: Find the right operations pathway
settings.text: Start with the operational outcome, then choose the service, resource or support route that fits.
